# Stacked Construction

> Premium home remodeling contractor serving Southwest Florida. Expert kitchen remodeling, bathroom renovation, outdoor living, flooring & tile, and full home renovations across Fort Myers, Naples, Cape Coral, Bonita Springs, Marco Island, Punta Gorda, and all of SWFL.

## Company Information

- Name: Stacked Construction
- Website: https://stackedconstruction.co
- Phone: (239) 785-0166
- Email: info@stackedconstruction.co
- Location: Fort Myers, FL 33901
- Service Area: Lee County, Collier County, Charlotte County (Southwest Florida)
- Hours: Mon-Fri 7am-6pm, Sat 8am-2pm
- Rating: 5/5 stars, 150+ projects completed
- Licensed & Insured in Florida

## Services

- [Kitchen Remodeling](https://stackedconstruction.co/services/kitchen-remodeling): Custom cabinetry, countertops, backsplashes, and complete kitchen transformations.
- [Bathroom Remodeling](https://stackedconstruction.co/services/bathroom-remodeling): Modern vanities, walk-in showers, soaking tubs, and spa-inspired designs.
- [Home Renovation](https://stackedconstruction.co/services/home-renovation): Comprehensive whole-home remodels from floor plan to finishing touches.
- [Outdoor Living & Kitchens](https://stackedconstruction.co/services/outdoor-living): Outdoor kitchens, patios, pool decks, and living spaces for the Florida lifestyle.
- [Flooring & Tile](https://stackedconstruction.co/services/flooring-tile): Hardwood, porcelain, natural stone, and luxury vinyl installation.

## Service Areas

### Cities
- [Fort Myers](https://stackedconstruction.co/areas/fort-myers)
- [Cape Coral](https://stackedconstruction.co/areas/cape-coral)
- [Naples](https://stackedconstruction.co/areas/naples)

- [Marco Island](https://stackedconstruction.co/areas/marco-island)
- [Punta Gorda](https://stackedconstruction.co/areas/punta-gorda)

### Counties
- [Lee County](https://stackedconstruction.co/areas/lee-county)
- [Collier County](https://stackedconstruction.co/areas/collier-county)
- [Charlotte County](https://stackedconstruction.co/areas/charlotte-county)

### Also Serving
Estero, Lehigh Acres, Port Charlotte, North Fort Myers, Fort Myers Beach, Sanibel

- [Contact / Free Estimate](https://stackedconstruction.co/contact): Request a free, no-obligation remodeling consultation.
- [Articles](https://stackedconstruction.co/blog): Expert remodeling advice, cost guides, and design inspiration for SWFL homeowners.
